info.title: Media Platform API
info.description: Queue-based media playback controller for homelab

post.description: Add a media item to the queue

delete.description: Remove an item from the queue

post.description: Reorder a queue item to a new position (admin only)

get.description: Atomic snapshot of all client-relevant state for fast sync
Get analytics snapshot with optional time range
List all registered players with liveness status
Get diagnostic logs for a specific player
List all players with version comparison against expected version

post.description: Set the expected player software version
Broadcast an update-available SSE event to all connected players
Activate the emergency kill switch — blocks all writes

get.description: Get network connectivity metrics and trend for a specific player

post.description: Dry-run policy evaluation against a URL
Register a player node with the API
Notify API of a planned player disconnect (graceful shutdown)
Submit a batch of player diagnostic logs
Submit aggregated network connectivity metrics from a player

get.description: Returns a 100 KB payload for player-side bandwidth estimation
Search YouTube videos (uses YouTube Data API if configured, Piped fallback otherwise)
